# Support

## Product and implementation enquiries

For implementation support, reviews, training, or delivery discussions, use:

- https://hybridops.tech/contact
- https://docs.hybridops.tech/CONTRACTING/

## Documentation corrections and repository issues

Use the repository issue tracker for:

- defects
- documentation corrections
- broken links
- compatibility notes
- scoped improvement requests

## Security reports

Do not open public issues for vulnerabilities.

Report security issues to:

- **[security@hybridops.tech](mailto:security@hybridops.tech)**
